step_rationale: Insulin-responsive glucose transporter dysregulation in I/R injury; cardiomyocyte metabolism.
mechanism: GLUT4 dysregulation impairs myocardial glucose handling and energetics during ischemia-reperfusion.

references.title: Cardiac ischaemia/reperfusion in pigs and mice increases cardiomyocyte Krüppel-like factor 5 that aggravates tissue injury and remodelling.
